title: burragea fruticulosa
intro: Burragea fruticulosa, also known as the 'Kusum' or 'Kusum tree,' is a type of flowering evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Burragea fruticulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as acne and wounds. Burragea fruticulosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
